description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and a prominent second-story terrace. The terrace is enclosed by a wooden railing and furnished with an outdoor umbrella and seating, suggesting a space for relaxation or social gatherings. The front facade includes a large garage door at ground level and a small covered entryway with a single door. The exterior walls are mostly smooth and unadorned, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy and simplicity. The rear and side elevations are largely solid, with only a few small windows and no additional decorative elements. The overall color palette is dominated by dark and neutral tones, giving the house a contemporary urban appearance.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a large second-story terrace, minimal windows, and a dark, sleek exterior. The front features a garage and a small entryway, while the terrace is furnished for outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entryway, and the furnished terrace with umbrella and seating.
description_view_1: Rear view dominated by plain walls and the terrace area, with minimal window openings visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the solid, windowless wall and a small window on the upper level.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the terrace, railing, and a person standing, with the rest of the house mostly featureless.
attribute_entryway_design: Small covered entryway with a single door, minimal steps, and a flat overhang adjacent to the garage.
